scripts.build:all: pnpm run build:docs & pnpm run build:gui & pnpm run build:matriz & pnpm run build:filial &
scripts.uploadfs:matriz: cd matriz-esp32 && pio run --target buildfs && pio run --target uploadfs
scripts.uploadfs:filial: cd filial-esp32 && pio run --target buildfs && pio run --target uploadfs
